refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and the operational context (agreed network conditions), enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and compare against customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated high-reliability network link with QoS guarantees.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic parameter tuning.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

coupling_check.notes: The adaptive protocol logically isolates communication quality management, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk of increased latency due to retransmissions affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding latency monitoring and mitigation in future refinements.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and communication stack responsible for teleoperation control and communication quality management.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection used for teleoperation data exchange.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to send communication quality metrics and status to NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level system module; contains coordination but not detailed communication logic.
Physical vehicle hardware; limited role in communication protocol implementation.
Primary module responsible for teleoperation communication and control; best containment fit.
Focuses on safety alerts, not communication quality management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning the DP to the Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, reducing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with NGHE Solution for telemetry reporting.
Dependency on Network Link interface quality and availability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for telemetry data.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP directly addresses the refined FR with a clear mechanism to control packet loss.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if communication protocol logic is partially implemented outside Teleoperation.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows highest containment score and aligns well with DP responsibilities.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring packet loss metrics via Telemetry interface during teleoperation tests.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality management to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit telemetry data format and update frequency.
Review latency impact of retransmission strategy in next refinement.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently refines the FR, selects a suitable DP, and assigns it to an appropriate IM with clear interfaces and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report communication quality status to relevant modules.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; next step is to decompose sub-FRs for further detail.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Teleoperation module has capability to implement adaptive communication protocols.
open_risks: Latency impact of retransmission on teleoperation responsiveness.
Interface clarity between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for telemetry.
evidence_needed: Test data on packet loss under various network conditions.
Latency measurements during teleoperation with adaptive protocol.
